subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! Rejoice thou in that the Pen of thy Lord's Will, the Mighty, the All-Knowing, hath moved to make mention of thee. Verily, He remembereth whoso remembereth Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل افرح بما تحرک علی ذکرک قلم ارادة ربک العزیز العلام انه یذکر من ذکره
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
